moments.title: Wimbledon Finals Weekend
moments.blurb: The 2026 Wimbledon Championships conclude this weekend, with the Gentlemen's and Ladies' Singles Finals on Saturday and Sunday.

angles.name: Live Tennis Thrills
angles.copy: Who will lift the trophies? It's the final weekend at Wimbledon 2026! Catch all the action from SW19.

angles.name: Wimbledon Fashion & Vibes
angles.copy: Strawberries & cream, sunshine (hopefully!), and world-class tennis. The Wimbledon finals are here – soaking up the atmosphere.

moments.title: Genesis Scottish Open concludes
moments.blurb: The Genesis Scottish Open, a key golf tournament on the DP World Tour and PGA Tour, wraps up its final rounds this weekend in North Berwick, Scotland.

angles.name: Golfing Glory in Scotland
angles.copy: It's moving day at the Genesis Scottish Open! Who's making a charge for the title in North Berwick?

moments.title: Richie Sambora turns 67
moments.blurb: Bon Jovi's iconic former guitarist and songwriter Richie Sambora celebrates his 67th birthday tomorrow, July 11.

angles.name: Rock Legend Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 67th birthday to the incredible Richie Sambora! What's your favourite Bon Jovi riff he's responsible for?

moments.title: Alessia Cara turns 30
moments.blurb: Grammy-winning Canadian pop singer Alessia Cara, known for hits like 'Here' and 'Scars to Your Beautiful', celebrates her 30th birthday tomorrow, July 11.

angles.name: Pop Star Milestone
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 30th birthday to the brilliant Alessia Cara! What's your go-to track from her?

moments.title: Lil' Kim turns 52
moments.blurb: The legendary rapper and fashion icon Lil' Kim celebrates her 52nd birthday tomorrow, July 11.

angles.name: Hip-Hop Queen Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 52nd birthday to the Queen Bee herself, Lil' Kim! Drop your favourite track below.

moments.title: Roger McGuinn (The Byrds) turns 84
moments.blurb: Roger McGuinn, co-founder and lead guitarist of the influential 60s band The Byrds, celebrates his 84th birthday on July 13.

angles.name: Folk Rock Pioneer
angles.copy: Happy 84th birthday to the legendary Roger McGuinn of The Byrds! What's your favourite Byrds track?

moments.title: Tulisa Contostavlos turns 38
moments.blurb: Singer, songwriter and TV personality Tulisa Contostavlos, known for N-Dubz, celebrates her 38th birthday on July 13.

angles.name: N-Dubz Star Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 38th birthday to the one and only Tulisa! What's your favourite N-Dubz anthem?

moments.title: Harrison Ford turns 84
moments.blurb: Iconic actor Harrison Ford, star of Indiana Jones and Star Wars, celebrates his 84th birthday on July 13.

angles.name: Han Solo's Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 84th birthday to the legend, Harrison Ford! What's your favourite of his iconic roles?

moments.title: Dan Reynolds (Imagine Dragons) turns 39
moments.blurb: Imagine Dragons frontman Dan Reynolds celebrates his 39th birthday on July 14.

angles.name: Imagine Dragons Frontman
angles.copy: Wishing a huge happy 39th birthday to Dan Reynolds of Imagine Dragons! What's your favourite track from the band?

moments.title: Linda Ronstadt turns 80
moments.blurb: Grammy-winning singer Linda Ronstadt, known for her versatile voice and hits across rock, country, and pop, celebrates her 80th birthday on July 15.

angles.name: Music Icon's Milestone
angles.copy: Happy 80th birthday to the incredible Linda Ronstadt! A true legend across so many genres. What's your favourite of her timeless songs?

moments.title: The Open Championship begins
moments.blurb: The 154th Open Championship, one of golf's four major tournaments, begins its main competition days on July 16 at Royal Birkdale Golf Club in Southport, England.

angles.name: Golf's Greatest Show
angles.copy: Fore! The Open Championship kicks off its main tournament days at Royal Birkdale on Thursday. Who are you backing for the Claret Jug?

moments.title: Richard Marx turns 63
moments.blurb: Singer-songwriter Richard Marx, known for 80s and 90s soft rock hits like 'Right Here Waiting', celebrates his 63rd birthday on July 16.

angles.name: 80s Ballad King
angles.copy: Happy 63rd birthday to the fantastic Richard Marx! What's your favourite power ballad from him?

moments.title: Wizkid turns 35
moments.blurb: Nigerian superstar singer and songwriter Wizkid, a global ambassador for Afrobeats, celebrates his 35th birthday on July 16.

angles.name: Afrobeats Star Birthday
angles.copy: Sending big birthday wishes to the incredible Wizkid, turning 35! What's your favourite track from the Starboy?

moments.title: First Night of the Proms 2026
moments.blurb: The world-renowned BBC Proms classical music festival begins its 2026 season on July 17 at the Royal Albert Hall in London, with the First Night of the Proms.

angles.name: Classical Extravaganza
angles.copy: The greatest classical music festival in the world returns! The First Night of the Proms 2026 kicks off at the Royal Albert Hall this Friday. Tune in!

angles.name: Proms Season Begins
angles.copy: Get ready for 8 weeks of incredible music! The BBC Proms season starts Friday – what are you most looking forward to?

moments.title: Geezer Butler (Black Sabbath) turns 77
moments.blurb: Terence 'Geezer' Butler, the legendary bassist and lyricist for Black Sabbath, celebrates his 77th birthday on July 17.

angles.name: Metal Legend Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 77th birthday to the mighty Geezer Butler of Black Sabbath! The riff master and lyrical genius. What's your favourite Sabbath track?

moments.title: Martha Reeves turns 85
moments.blurb: Martha Reeves, the iconic lead singer of Martha and the Vandellas, celebrates her 85th birthday on July 18.

angles.name: Motown Queen Birthday
angles.copy: Dancing in the street for Martha Reeves' 85th birthday! Happy birthday to the incredible Motown legend!

moments.title: Carlos Santana turns 79
moments.blurb: Legendary guitarist Carlos Santana, known for his distinctive fusion of rock and Latin American jazz, celebrates his 79th birthday on July 20.

angles.name: Guitar God's Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 79th birthday to the one and only Carlos Santana! What's your favourite Santana guitar solo?

moments.title: Paul Cook (Sex Pistols) turns 70
moments.blurb: Paul Cook, drummer for the iconic punk band Sex Pistols, celebrates his 70th birthday on July 20.

angles.name: Punk Icon Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 70th birthday to Sex Pistols drummer Paul Cook! Anarchy in the UK, indeed!

moments.title: Stone Gossard (Pearl Jam) turns 60
moments.blurb: Stone Gossard, rhythm guitarist and co-founder of grunge legends Pearl Jam, celebrates his 60th birthday on July 20.

angles.name: Grunge Guitarist Milestone
angles.copy: Happy 60th birthday to Stone Gossard of Pearl Jam! A true grunge pioneer. What's your top Pearl Jam song?

moments.title: Mick MacNeil (Simple Minds) turns 67
moments.blurb: Mick MacNeil, keyboardist for Scottish rock band Simple Minds, celebrates his 67th birthday on July 20.

angles.name: Simple Minds Keyboardist
angles.copy: Happy 67th birthday to Mick MacNeil of Simple Minds! Those iconic synth lines defined an era.
